creator: jmg@gold.funkthat.com
text:
The memstick boots, and prints information about the EFI frame buffer:
EFI framebuffer information:
addr, size	0x90020000, 0x1c20000
dimensions	2880 x 1800
stride		4096
masks		0x00ff0000, 0x0000ff00, 0x000000ff, 0xff000000

Environment:
memstick:
FreeBSD-11.0-CURRENT-amd64-20150421-r281832-memstick.img

Machine: MacBook Pro mid-2012

EFI version: 1.0
EFI Firmware: Apple (rev 1.10)

MacBookPro10,1
ROM Version MBP101.00EE.B07
SMC Version 2.3f36

How-To-Repeat:
dd the memstick snapshot image to a USB thumb drive, try to boot the
machine and watch it hang...

Fix:
unknown
